design_philosophy: A clean, modern, mobile-first PWA inspired by Jago Bank's 'pocket' system. It unifies 5 disparate business units under one cohesive, earthy design system. It uses 'Digital Envelopes' (Kantong) for each business unit to provide clear financial segregation while maintaining a unified overview. The UI is high-contrast for outdoor (vineyard) readability, relying on solid structural elements rather than generic SaaS aesthetics.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Mobile-first design (375-414px) scalable to tablet and desktop. Tap targets minimum 44px for outdoor staff use.

navigation.bottom_nav: Fixed bottom. White bg, shadow-[0_-4px_6px_-1px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]. 5 items (Dashboard, Warung, Kasir, Inventori, Laporan). Active state uses Primary Green text and icon fill.
navigation.hamburger_drawer: Left side drawer (Sheet component from shadcn). Dark green (#1a6b3c) background, white text. Lists all 13 modules.

cards.unit_pocket: Jago Bank inspired 'Kantong'. White background, 12px radius. Colored top border or subtle colored background tint based on unit color. Contains title, balance (monospace), and quick action.
cards.stat_card: Padded p-4, white bg, border border-gray-200, rounded-xl.

buttons.primary: bg-[#1a6b3c] hover:bg-[#14522d] text-white font-semibold rounded-lg px-4 py-3 min-h-[44px]
buttons.accent: bg-[#f4a228] hover:bg-[#d98b1a] text-white font-semibold rounded-lg px-4 py-3 min-h-[44px]
buttons.fab: Fixed bottom-right (above nav), rounded-full w-14 h-14 flex items-center justify-center bg-[#1a6b3c] text-white shadow-lg

forms.inputs: bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a6b3c] focus:border-transparent text-base (prevents iOS zoom)

charts.usage: Use CustomTooltip with white bg and shadow. Remove CartesianGrid lines for cleaner look. Use business_units colors for pie/donut charts.

feedback.toast: Sonner library. Bottom-center on mobile. Use semantic colors for success/error.

login.layout: Full height split screen on desktop, relative overlap on mobile.
login.background: Use vineyard landscape image with a dark green overlay (bg-[#1a6b3c]/80).
login.card: White glassmorphic card on mobile, solid white on desktop. Contains brand logo, email/pin login, and 'Masuk' button.

dashboard.header: Welcome text, current date, notification bell.
dashboard.kpi_section: Total Revenue, Total Expense, Net Profit, Cash Position. Format using JetBrains Mono.
dashboard.pockets_section: Horizontal scrollable list of 'Kantong Unit' (Business Unit summary cards).
dashboard.charts: Weekly trend area chart (Revenue vs Expense).
dashboard.feed: Recent transactions list with icon indicating source unit.

warung.layout: Two-pane on tablet/desktop, tabbed on mobile.
warung.tables_view: Grid of tables. Status colors: Green (Available), Amber (Occupied), Red (Needs Cleaning).
warung.order_panel: Selected table details. Menu browser with categories. Add to cart functionality.

kasir.cart: List of selected items, qty modifiers (+/- minimum 44px tap target), subtotal.
kasir.payment: Multi-payment method selector (Tunai, QRIS, Transfer, e-Wallet).

inventori.layout: List view with robust filtering (Unit, Kategori).
inventori.items: Row contains: Item Name, Stock Level, Unit. Low stock gets warning badge.
inventori.bom_editor: Modal or distinct page to link raw materials to finished goods (e.g. Anggur -> Wine/Jus).

laporan.layout: Tabbed view: Laba/Rugi (P&L), Neraca (Balance Sheet), Arus Kas (Cash Flow).
laporan.ui: Structured tabular data with indentation for sub-accounts. Tooltips [?] on complex financial terms for non-accountant users.

investor_modal.visuals: Pie chart of ownership equity (4 investors).
investor_modal.features: Capital injection log, Dividend distribution simulator.

testing_attributes.instructions: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Format: kebab-case, role-based. e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='nav-warung-tab'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: lucide-react, recharts, sonner.
Implement layout as a mobile-first PWA with bottom navigation.
Ensure typography strictness: Poppins for headings, Inter for body, JetBrains Mono for all numeric/financial values.
Prefix all currency values with 'Rp' and format with periods (e.g., Rp 1.500.000).
Adhere strictly to the business_units color coding for charts and 'Kantong' style cards to create visual distinction between the 5 units.
Use data-testid on all interactive elements as mandated.
Build the Jago Bank inspired 'Pockets' (Kantong) UI for the Dashboard.
